hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "vitest" && echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -qE "[Cc]overage"; then echo "[coverage-check] Review coverage output above. Ensure it meets the 80% threshold."; fi'
hooks.description: Remind to check coverage threshold after test runs with coverage

hooks.command: bash -c 'if echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q "pnpm build" && echo "$TOOL_OUTPUT" | grep -q "built in"; then echo "[build-success] Build completed. Consider running tests: pnpm test"; fi'
hooks.description: Remind to run tests after successful builds
